mapper.sql: u.id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('用户', u.id)) AS nickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(u.photo_url, '')) AS avatar, COALESCE(ext.bio, '') AS bio, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.status, ''), 'normal') AS userStatus
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM app_user u LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext ext ON ext.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_community_follow WHERE (from_user_id = #{userId} AND to_user_id = #{peerUserId}) OR (from_user_id = #{peerUserId} AND to_user_id = #{userId})
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_social_block WHERE status = 'active' AND ( (user_id = #{userId} AND blocked_user_id = #{peerUserId}) OR (user_id = #{peerUserId} AND blocked_user_id = #{userId}) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_human_chat_message ( conversation_key, from_user_id, to_user_id, message_type, payload_json, content_preview, status, is_read, client_msg_id, provider ) VALUES ( #{conversationKey}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{messageType}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSON), #{contentPreview}, #{status}, COALESCE(#{isRead}, 0), #{clientMsgId}, #{provider} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_human_chat_message WHERE id = #{messageId} LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: m.id AS messageId, m.client_msg_id AS clientMsgId, m.conversation_key AS conversationKey, m.from_user_id AS fromUserId, m.to_user_id AS toUserId, m.message_type AS messageType, m.payload_json AS payload, m.content_preview AS contentPreview, m.status AS status, m.is_read AS isRead, m.read_at AS readAt, m.recalled_at AS recalledAt, m.provider AS provider, m.created_at AS createdAt, from_user.id AS fromCardUserId, COALESCE(NULLIF(from_ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(from_user.username, ''), CONCAT('用户', from_user.id)) AS fromNickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(from_ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(from_user.photo_url, '')) AS fromAvatar, to_user.id AS toCardUserId, COALESCE(NULLIF(to_ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(to_user.username, ''), CONCAT('用户', to_user.id)) AS toNickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(to_ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(to_user.photo_url, '')) AS toAvatar, CASE WHEN m.from_user_id = #{viewerId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS mine

m.id AS messageId, m.client_msg_id AS clientMsgId, m.conversation_key AS conversationKey, m.from_user_id AS fromUserId, m.to_user_id AS toUserId, m.message_type AS messageType, m.payload_json AS payload, m.content_preview AS contentPreview, m.status AS status, m.is_read AS isRead, m.read_at AS readAt, m.recalled_at AS recalledAt, m.provider AS provider, m.created_at AS createdAt, from_user.id AS fromCardUserId, COALESCE(NULLIF(from_ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(from_user.username, ''), CONCAT('用户', from_user.id)) AS fromNickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(from_ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(from_user.photo_url, '')) AS fromAvatar, to_user.id AS toCardUserId, COALESCE(NULLIF(to_ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(to_user.username, ''), CONCAT('用户', to_user.id)) AS toNickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(to_ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(to_user.photo_url, '')) AS toAvatar, 0 AS mine
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM app_human_chat_message m LEFT JOIN app_user from_user ON from_user.id = m.from_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext from_ext ON from_ext.user_id = m.from_user_id LEFT JOIN app_user to_user ON to_user.id = m.to_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext to_ext ON to_ext.user_id = m.to_user_id WHERE m.id = #{messageId} AND (m.from_user_id = #{viewerId} OR m.to_user_id = #{viewerId}) LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_human_chat_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'normal'

SELECT c.id AS conversationId, c.conversation_key AS conversationKey, c.user_id AS userId, c.peer_user_id AS peerUserId, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('用户', c.peer_user_id)) AS peerNickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(u.photo_url, '')) AS peerAvatar, COALESCE(ext.bio, '') AS peerBio, c.last_message_id AS lastMessageId, c.last_message_type AS lastMessageType, c.last_message_payload AS lastMessagePayload, c.last_message_preview AS lastMessagePreview, c.last_message_at AS lastMessageAt, c.unread_count AS unreadCount, c.status AS status, c.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM app_human_chat_conversation c LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id = c.peer_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext ext ON ext.user_id = c.peer_user_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.status = 'normal' ORDER BY c.last_message_at DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_human_chat_conversation ( conversation_key, user_id, peer_user_id, last_message_id, last_message_type, last_message_payload, last_message_preview, last_message_at, unread_count, status ) VALUES ( #{conversationKey}, #{userId}, #{peerUserId}, #{lastMessageId}, #{messageType}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSON), #{preview}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0, 'normal' ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_message_id = VALUES(last_message_id), last_message_type = VALUES(last_message_type), last_message_payload = VALUES(last_message_payload), last_message_preview = VALUES(last_message_preview), last_message_at = VALUES(last_message_at), status = 'normal', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO app_human_chat_conversation ( conversation_key, user_id, peer_user_id, last_message_id, last_message_type, last_message_payload, last_message_preview, last_message_at, unread_count, status ) VALUES ( #{conversationKey}, #{userId}, #{peerUserId}, #{lastMessageId}, #{messageType}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSON), #{preview}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 1, 'normal' ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_message_id = VALUES(last_message_id), last_message_type = VALUES(last_message_type), last_message_payload = VALUES(last_message_payload), last_message_preview = VALUES(last_message_preview), last_message_at = VALUES(last_message_at), unread_count = unread_count + 1, status = 'normal', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE app_human_chat_message SET status = 'recalled', recalled_at = COALESCE(recalled_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), content_preview = '消息已撤回', payload_json = JSON_OBJECT('type', message_type, 'recalled', true), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{messageId} AND from_user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'normal'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_human_chat_message WHERE conversation_key = #{conversationKey} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE app_human_chat_conversation SET last_message_id = #{lastMessageId}, last_message_type = #{messageType}, last_message_payload =
CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSON)
NULL
, last_message_preview = #{preview}, last_message_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE conversation_key = #{conversationKey}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_human_chat_conversation c LEFT JOIN app_user user_u ON user_u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext user_ext ON user_ext.user_id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN app_user peer_u ON peer_u.id = c.peer_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext peer_ext ON peer_ext.user_id = c.peer_user_id

SELECT c.id AS conversationId, c.conversation_key AS conversationKey, c.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(user_ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(user_u.username, ''), CONCAT('鐢ㄦ埛', c.user_id)) AS userNickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(user_ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(user_u.photo_url, '')) AS userAvatar, c.peer_user_id AS peerUserId, COALESCE(NULLIF(peer_ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(peer_u.username, ''), CONCAT('鐢ㄦ埛', c.peer_user_id)) AS peerNickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(peer_ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(peer_u.photo_url, '')) AS peerAvatar, c.last_message_id AS lastMessageId, c.last_message_type AS lastMessageType, c.last_message_payload AS lastMessagePayload, c.last_message_preview AS lastMessagePreview, c.last_message_at AS lastMessageAt, c.unread_count AS unreadCount, c.status AS status, c.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM app_human_chat_conversation c LEFT JOIN app_user user_u ON user_u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext user_ext ON user_ext.user_id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN app_user peer_u ON peer_u.id = c.peer_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext peer_ext ON peer_ext.user_id = c.peer_user_id
ORDER BY c.last_message_at DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT c.id AS conversationId, c.conversation_key AS conversationKey, c.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(user_ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(user_u.username, ''), CONCAT('鐢ㄦ埛', c.user_id)) AS userNickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(user_ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(user_u.photo_url, '')) AS userAvatar, c.peer_user_id AS peerUserId, COALESCE(NULLIF(peer_ext.nickname, ''), NULLIF(peer_u.username, ''), CONCAT('鐢ㄦ埛', c.peer_user_id)) AS peerNickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(peer_ext.avatar, ''), NULLIF(peer_u.photo_url, '')) AS peerAvatar, c.last_message_id AS lastMessageId, c.last_message_type AS lastMessageType, c.last_message_payload AS lastMessagePayload, c.last_message_preview AS lastMessagePreview, c.last_message_at AS lastMessageAt, c.unread_count AS unreadCount, c.status AS status, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM app_human_chat_conversation c LEFT JOIN app_user user_u ON user_u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext user_ext ON user_ext.user_id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN app_user peer_u ON peer_u.id = c.peer_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext peer_ext ON peer_ext.user_id = c.peer_user_id WHERE c.id = #{conversationId} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_human_chat_message m LEFT JOIN app_user from_user ON from_user.id = m.from_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext from_ext ON from_ext.user_id = m.from_user_id LEFT JOIN app_user to_user ON to_user.id = m.to_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext to_ext ON to_ext.user_id = m.to_user_id

SELECT
FROM app_human_chat_message m LEFT JOIN app_user from_user ON from_user.id = m.from_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext from_ext ON from_ext.user_id = m.from_user_id LEFT JOIN app_user to_user ON to_user.id = m.to_user_id LEFT JOIN app_h5_user_profile_ext to_ext ON to_ext.user_id = m.to_user_id WHERE m.id = #{messageId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_human_chat_message SET status = 'recalled', recalled_at = COALESCE(recalled_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), content_preview = '消息已撤回', payload_json = JSON_OBJECT('type', message_type, 'recalled', true, 'adminRecall', true), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{messageId} AND status = 'normal'
